objective: Implement production-grade observer/publisher execution with fail-closed behavior, scheduler wiring, and contract-aligned API/model runtime.
non_goals: multi-forum runtime implementation beyond ppomppu adapter

completed: Spec-kit planning artifacts and schemas are created
Shared TypeScript models added in contracts/models.ts
gaps: Publisher still in simulation mode (submit click disabled)
Scheduler loop not wired to RUN_INTERVAL_MINUTES
No runtime validator for workflow/schema files at startup

constraints: Do not weaken safety guards before enabling live publish
Maintain strict env contract validation at startup
Preserve compatibility with current Express + React + Playwright stack
acceptance_criteria: Observer produces contract-valid logs with confidence-aware decision outcomes
Publisher can execute real submit only when DRY_RUN_MODE=false and guard checks pass
Scheduler triggers observer/publisher loop according to RUN_INTERVAL_MINUTES
API responses remain aligned with data-contracts.schema.json
Integration tests cover observer run, blocked publish, and manual override paths

implementation_plan.name: Harden observer parsing
actions: Add parse-confidence scoring and fallback selector chain
Emit MANUAL_REVIEW-equivalent status path on low confidence

implementation_plan.name: Finalize publisher safety flow
actions: Retain draft/body/category verification and abort on failures

implementation_plan.name: Add scheduler loop
actions: Use RUN_INTERVAL_MINUTES to trigger periodic observer/publisher checks
Prevent overlapping runs with in-process lock

implementation_plan.name: Runtime contract validation
actions: Validate critical workflow/config JSON at startup

implementation_plan.name: Integration tests
actions: Implement API-level tests for run-observer and run-publisher force/non-force
Verify response payload shape against contracts

practical_recommendations: Use this handover file as the only seed context in the new session
Start with objective + acceptance criteria before coding details
Treat implementation_plan as flexible sequence; adjust order only with rationale
Record deviations under decisions_locked or constraints updates
Create follow-up handover files using handover-YYYYMMDD-HHMM.json naming
At each major milestone, update .agent/state/state.index.json last_handover_file
next_action: Start new session and implement Step 1 (observer hardening) with tests-first checkpoints.
